description: Rewrite 5 fake QuantTube components from object-tree format to real React JSX with Tailwind CSS: ContentGrid, LiveChat, MiniPlayer, Recommendations, VideoPlayer.
steps: Read apps/quantube/src/types/index.ts to understand Video, ChatMessage, Chapter, Subtitle, PlayerState, etc.
Rewrite apps/quantube/src/components/ContentGrid.tsx: Convert to JSX content/video grid layout.
Rewrite apps/quantube/src/components/LiveChat.tsx: Convert to JSX live chat with header (connection status, viewer count), message list with super chat badges, and input bar.
Rewrite apps/quantube/src/components/MiniPlayer.tsx: Convert to JSX mini/picture-in-picture player.
Rewrite apps/quantube/src/components/Recommendations.tsx: Convert to JSX recommendations panel.

Rewrite apps/quantube/src/components/VideoPlayer.tsx: Convert to JSX full video player with viewport, progress bar with chapter markers, and controls bar (play/pause, prev/next, volume, time display, speed/quality selects, CC, mini-player, fullscreen). Keep formatTime helper.
Verify: Run `pnpm typecheck --filter=@quant/quantube` passes with 0 errors.
acceptance_criteria: All 5 QuantTube files return JSX (not object trees)
grep -n "type: 'div'" across all 5 files returns 0 matches
All files maintain their original Props interfaces
All files use Tailwind CSS classes
Export structure preserved (named export + default export)
findings: All 5 QuantTube components rewritten to real JSX with Tailwind CSS. TypeScript passes with 0 errors for all 5 files. Pre-existing errors exist in other files (ChapterEditor, ShortsPlayer, useMusicPlayer, etc.) but are unrelated. Prettier auto-formatted on commit via lint-staged.
